results.compiled_code:
select
    cast(company_id as integer) as company_id,
    upper(trim(ticker)) as ticker,
    company_name,
    sector,
    industry,
    country,
    cast(listing_date as date) as listing_date
from read_parquet('data/silver/companies_clean/*.parquet')

select
    cast(company_id as varchar) || '-' || cast(date as varchar) as daily_price_key,
    cast(company_id as integer) as company_id,
    cast(date as date) as price_date,
    cast(close_price as double) as close_price,
    cast(volume as bigint) as volume,
    cast(daily_return as double) as daily_return,
    cast(moving_average_20d as double) as moving_average_20d,
    cast(rolling_volatility_20d as double) as rolling_volatility_20d,
    ticker,
    company_name,
    sector,
    industry,
    country
from read_parquet('data/silver/daily_price_features/*.parquet')

select
    cast(company_id as varchar) || '-' || fiscal_quarter as company_quarter_key,
    cast(company_id as integer) as company_id,
    fiscal_quarter,
    cast(fiscal_quarter_start_date as date) as fiscal_quarter_start_date,
    cast(revenue as double) as revenue,
    cast(gross_profit as double) as gross_profit,
    cast(operating_income as double) as operating_income,
    cast(net_income as double) as net_income,
    cast(total_assets as double) as total_assets,
    cast(total_liabilities as double) as total_liabilities,
    cast(equity as double) as equity,
    cast(operating_cash_flow as double) as operating_cash_flow,
    cast(previous_quarter_revenue as double) as previous_quarter_revenue,
    cast(revenue_growth_qoq as double) as revenue_growth_qoq,
    ticker,
    company_name,
    sector,
    industry,
    country
from read_parquet('data/silver/quarterly_fundamental_features/*.parquet')

with all_values as (

    select
        sector as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
    group by sector

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'Technology','Healthcare','Industrials','Consumer Defensive','Financial Services','Energy'
)

select company_id
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
where company_id is null

select company_name
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
where company_name is null

select sector
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
where sector is null

select ticker
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
where ticker is null

select
    company_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
where company_id is not null
group by company_id
having count(*) > 1

select
    ticker as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
where ticker is not null
group by ticker
having count(*) > 1

with daily_prices as (
    select
        company_id,
        ticker,
        company_name,
        sector,
        industry,
        country,
        price_date,
        close_price,
        volume,
        daily_return,
        moving_average_20d,
        rolling_volatility_20d,
        date_trunc('quarter', price_date) as fiscal_quarter_start_date
    from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
),

quarterly_aggregates as (
    select
        cast(company_id as varchar) || '-' || cast(fiscal_quarter_start_date as varchar) as company_quarter_feature_key,
        company_id,
        ticker,
        company_name,
        sector,
        industry,
        country,
        fiscal_quarter_start_date,
        avg(close_price) as average_close_price,
        max(close_price) as quarter_high_close_price,
        min(close_price) as quarter_low_close_price,
        avg(daily_return) as average_daily_return,
        avg(volume) as average_volume,
        avg(moving_average_20d) as average_moving_average_20d,
        avg(rolling_volatility_20d) as average_rolling_volatility_20d
    from daily_prices
    group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8
),

quarter_end_prices as (
    select
        company_id,
        fiscal_quarter_start_date,
        close_price as quarter_end_close_price,
        row_number() over (
            partition by company_id, fiscal_quarter_start_date
            order by price_date desc
        ) as quarter_end_rank
    from daily_prices
)

select
    quarterly_aggregates.company_quarter_feature_key,
    quarterly_aggregates.company_id,
    quarterly_aggregates.ticker,
    quarterly_aggregates.company_name,
    quarterly_aggregates.sector,
    quarterly_aggregates.industry,
    quarterly_aggregates.country,
    quarterly_aggregates.fiscal_quarter_start_date,
    quarterly_aggregates.average_close_price,
    quarterly_aggregates.quarter_high_close_price,
    quarterly_aggregates.quarter_low_close_price,
    quarter_end_prices.quarter_end_close_price,
    quarterly_aggregates.average_daily_return,
    quarterly_aggregates.average_volume,
    quarterly_aggregates.average_moving_average_20d,
    quarterly_aggregates.average_rolling_volatility_20d
from quarterly_aggregates
left join quarter_end_prices
    on quarterly_aggregates.company_id = quarter_end_prices.company_id
   and quarterly_aggregates.fiscal_quarter_start_date = quarter_end_prices.fiscal_quarter_start_date
   and quarter_end_prices.quarter_end_rank = 1

select close_price
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
where close_price is null

select company_id
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
where company_id is null

select daily_price_key
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
where daily_price_key is null

select price_date
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
where price_date is null

select sector
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
where sector is null

with child as (
    select company_id as from_field
    from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
    where company_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select company_id as to_field
    from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_companies"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select
    daily_price_key as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_daily_prices"
where daily_price_key is not null
group by daily_price_key
having count(*) > 1

select
    company_quarter_key,
    company_id,
    ticker,
    company_name,
    sector,
    industry,
    country,
    fiscal_quarter,
    fiscal_quarter_start_date,
    revenue,
    gross_profit,
    operating_income,
    net_income,
    total_assets,
    total_liabilities,
    equity,
    operating_cash_flow,
    previous_quarter_revenue,
    revenue_growth_qoq,
    gross_profit / nullif(revenue, 0) as gross_margin,
    operating_income / nullif(revenue, 0) as operating_margin,
    net_income / nullif(revenue, 0) as net_margin,
    total_liabilities / nullif(equity, 0) as debt_to_equity,
    net_income / nullif(total_assets, 0) as return_on_assets,
    operating_cash_flow / nullif(revenue, 0) as cash_flow_margin,
    revenue / nullif(total_assets, 0) as asset_turnover
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_quarterly_fundamentals"

with all_values as (

    select
        sector as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "finance_analytics"."finance"."stg_quarterly_fundamentals"
    group by sector

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'Technology','Healthcare','Industrials','Consumer Defensive','Financial Services','Energy'
)

select
    fundamental_ratios.company_quarter_key,
    fundamental_ratios.company_id,
    fundamental_ratios.ticker,
    fundamental_ratios.company_name,
    fundamental_ratios.sector,
    fundamental_ratios.industry,
    fundamental_ratios.country,
    fundamental_ratios.fiscal_quarter,
    fundamental_ratios.fiscal_quarter_start_date,
    fundamental_ratios.revenue,
    fundamental_ratios.gross_profit,
    fundamental_ratios.operating_income,
    fundamental_ratios.net_income,
    fundamental_ratios.total_assets,
    fundamental_ratios.total_liabilities,
    fundamental_ratios.equity,
    fundamental_ratios.operating_cash_flow,
    fundamental_ratios.previous_quarter_revenue,
    fundamental_ratios.revenue_growth_qoq,
    fundamental_ratios.gross_margin,
    fundamental_ratios.operating_margin,
    fundamental_ratios.net_margin,
    fundamental_ratios.debt_to_equity,
    fundamental_ratios.return_on_assets,
    fundamental_ratios.cash_flow_margin,
    fundamental_ratios.asset_turnover,
    price_features.average_close_price,
    price_features.quarter_high_close_price,
    price_features.quarter_low_close_price,
    price_features.quarter_end_close_price,
    price_features.average_daily_return,
    price_features.average_volume,
    price_features.average_moving_average_20d,
    price_features.average_rolling_volatility_20d
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."int_fundamental_ratios" as fundamental_ratios
left join "finance_analytics"."finance"."int_price_features" as price_features
    on fundamental_ratios.company_id = price_features.company_id
   and fundamental_ratios.fiscal_quarter_start_date = price_features.fiscal_quarter_start_date

select
    from_field

    company_quarter_key as unique_field,

select
    company_quarter_key,
    company_id,
    ticker,
    company_name,
    sector,
    industry,
    country,
    fiscal_quarter,
    fiscal_quarter_start_date,
    revenue,
    previous_quarter_revenue,
    revenue_growth_qoq,
    gross_profit,
    operating_income,

    total_assets,
    total_liabilities,
    equity,

    operating_margin,

    debt_to_equity,
    return_on_assets,
    cash_flow_margin,
    asset_turnover,
    average_close_price,
    quarter_high_close_price,
    quarter_low_close_price,
    quarter_end_close_price,
    average_daily_return,
    average_volume,
    average_moving_average_20d,
    average_rolling_volatility_20d,
    total_liabilities / nullif(total_assets, 0) as liabilities_to_assets
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."int_company_quarterly_features"

with all_values as (

    select
        sector as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "finance_analytics"."finance"."int_company_quarterly_features"
    group by sector

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (

)

select

from "finance_analytics"."finance"."int_company_quarterly_features"

group by company_quarter_key

with base as (
    select
        company_quarter_key,
        company_id,
        ticker,
        sector,
        industry,
        country,
        fiscal_quarter,
        fiscal_quarter_start_date,
        revenue_growth_qoq,
        gross_margin,
        operating_margin,
        net_margin,
        debt_to_equity,
        return_on_assets,
        cash_flow_margin,
        asset_turnover,
        average_daily_return,
        average_volume,
        average_moving_average_20d,
        average_rolling_volatility_20d,
        quarter_end_close_price
    from "finance_analytics"."finance"."mart_company_quarterly_metrics"
)

select
    *,
    lead(revenue_growth_qoq) over (
        partition by company_id
        order by fiscal_quarter_start_date
    ) as next_quarter_revenue_growth_qoq,
    case
        when lead(revenue_growth_qoq) over (
            partition by company_id
            order by fiscal_quarter_start_date
        ) > 0 then 1
        else 0
    end as next_quarter_growth_flag
from base

select
    sector || '-' || cast(fiscal_quarter_start_date as varchar) as sector_quarter_key,
    sector,
    fiscal_quarter,
    fiscal_quarter_start_date,
    count(distinct company_id) as company_count,
    avg(revenue_growth_qoq) as average_revenue_growth_qoq,
    avg(gross_margin) as average_gross_margin,
    avg(operating_margin) as average_operating_margin,
    avg(net_margin) as average_net_margin,
    avg(debt_to_equity) as average_debt_to_equity,
    avg(return_on_assets) as average_return_on_assets,
    avg(average_daily_return) as average_daily_return,
    avg(average_rolling_volatility_20d) as average_price_volatility
from "finance_analytics"."finance"."mart_company_quarterly_metrics"
group by 1, 2, 3, 4
